query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contract_accessories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractId INT NOT NULL,
  accessoryId INT NOT NULL,
  qty INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ok',
  observacao TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2uiJuwepBaepVjU.root --database 9oQjN6PX9fNMedgfErUfQE --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contract_accessories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractId INT NOT NULL,
  accessoryId INT NOT NULL,
  qty INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ok',
  observacao TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
